name: Turkey Broccoli Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 cups coarsely diced cooked turkey (2 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Cook broccoli according to package directions.
3. Layer the cooked broccoli and diced turkey in a 12 x 8 inch baking dish.
4. Pour the soup mixture (soup can plus milk) over the turkey layer.
5. Sprinkle grated cheese evenly on top.
6. Bake for 30 minutes. Let stand 5 minutes before serving.
